h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.statedInsightEvidence: Oh, I get it: the same exact quote can still point to the wrong role if the label lets tomorrow’s audience hear it as a belief instead of an answer to power.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to progressively analyze and refine the caption's length and accuracy.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: The two-strip reading has done its job; it showed the risk, but it cannot choose the cut for the board. Make one trial cut now: cover one word you think can go.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor shifts from conceptual analysis to physical object work and a new persona constraint to help the learner make a concrete decision.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: Since there is no pivot learner turn, there is no recognition-contingent tutor uptake.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: Since there is no pivot learner turn, there is no recognition-contingent tutor uptake.
